title: The Choppa Age Update
description: This mod adds Choppas, Chopper Golems, Choppa Chests, and a new Choppa Golem boss to Minecraft. There are new items such as the cleavers, and a new extremely common biome called the wastelands.
body:
## This mod was built for a CragDyna video.. GET TO THE CHOPPA

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qaRAHFaeMBc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## What has been added!

**Mobs**
- Choppas
- Choppers
- Choppa Chests
- Choppa Boss

**Items**
- Cleavers
- Copper Nuggets
- Copper Chests
- Helicopter Hats

**Structures**
- Abandoned Buildings
- Craig's Diner
- Bank
- Boss Arena

**Biome**
- Wasteland
